creator: Tom Walsh
source_text:
BUTTER CHICKEN MAC N’ CHEESE

Per Serving (Makes 10)
545 Calories
42g Protein
58g Carbs
17g Fat

A CRAZY indulgent recipe from my Slow Cooker Cookbook (added in 2026) - available in both print and digital formats!

Ingredients:
900g (32oz) chicken breast, diced
2 onions, sautéed until browned
30g (2 Tbsp) tomato paste
30g (2 Tbsp) garlic paste
15g (1 Tbsp) ginger paste 
30g (2 Tbsp) butter
400g (14oz) blended fire-roasted tomatoes
15g (1 Tbsp) sugar or zero-cal sweetener

Spice blend:
2 Tbsp paprika
1 Tbsp chili powder 
1 Tbsp spicy curry powder 
2 tsp cumin
1 Tbsp salt
Dash of black pepper

High: 2–3 hours
OR
Low: 3–4 hours

672g shell pasta, cooked to 50% of box time
1 cup pasta water

400g plain 0% Greek yogurt (FAGE brand)
120g 1/3 fat cream cheese
Chopped cilantro and green onions
227g extra sharp cheddar
80g reduced fat mozzarella 
1 tsp garam masala

-

#stealthhealth #mealprep #highprotein #highproteinmealprep

expected.name: BUTTER CHICKEN MAC N’ CHEESE
raw_ingredients: 672g shell pasta, cooked to 50% of box time

notes: Agent-labeled from the frozen Instagram description before viewing parser output; heat settings alone do not supply a preparation instruction.
The parser matched the conservative fallback oracle exactly.
